tables.title: The Five ICS Functional Sections
rows: Sets objectives; overall authority (+ safety, PIO, liaison)
Declares surge levels; approves the plan
Tracks situation/resources; writes the action plan
Bed counts, patient tracking, next operational period

tables.title: ICS Core Principles
rows: Activate only what the incident needs; expand/contract
Every person reports to exactly one incident supervisor
Multi-agency incidents share objectives under one plan
